---
description: "Socratic grilling session — challenge an ML hypothesis"
agent: hfd.grillme
---

Start a Socratic grilling session for this ML project. Interrogate the
hypothesis, sharpen terminology, and build docs/constitution.md as decisions
crystallise.

Context the user should provide:
- What business problem motivates this project
- What data sources are available (paths or descriptions)
- What they think the hypothesis is (even if vague)
- Any existing models or baselines in production
